Method 2: JPG/PNG to OLED using LCDAssistant
1) Take an Image like panda.jpg and open with Paint.
2) Resize this image to 128x64 because this soware has a bug that only support it
3) Now save the resized image as “bmp” format
4) Save Image as “monochrome” bitmap format
5) Now open “LCDAssistant.exe” and load an Image le
6) Then set Byte orientaon to Horizontal & size must be 128x64 & save the output
Tutorial Link:
hps://miliohm.com/how-to-
draw-or-print-bitmap-to-oled-
display-arduino/
Method 3: JPG/PNG to OLED using lcd-image-converter
1) Take an Image like panda.jpg and open with Paint.
2) Resize this image to as per your requirement make sure the height is 64
3) Now open “lcd-image-converter.exe” and open an Image le
4) Then copy the array & paste in your code
Tutorial Link:
hps://www.hackster.io/Arnov_
Sharma_makes/displaying-your-
own-photo-on-oled-display-
5a8e8b
